headline: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 is projected #16 of 16 with a 486.90 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Jonathan Taylor, Chase Brown, and Javonte Williams. The immediate priority is improving the WR slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On October 28, Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 traded with Murray had a little Lamb and acquired Kayshon Boutte while sending 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the WR slot above Parker Washington's 64.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 69.0 C-AVI would directly attack the 4.20-point projected gap to Northside Kings.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #16 of 16 at 486.90 lineup C-AVI. Northside Kings is immediately above at 491.10, a gap of 4.20.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jonathan Taylor (97.6), Chase Brown (96.3), and Javonte Williams (81.1).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On October 28, Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 traded with Murray had a little Lamb and acquired Kayshon Boutte while sending 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the WR slot above Parker Washington's 64.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 69.0 C-AVI would directly attack the 4.20-point projected gap to Northside Kings. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Rival Watch
sections.body: This franchise is currently projected last, so there is no team immediately beneath it.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Parker Washington is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 64.8. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 8 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
